title: Skybridge Market Before Visit
summary: A noisy market where couriers, brokers, and thieves overlap.
notes:
A noisy market where couriers, brokers, and thieves overlap.

Read-aloud cues: Bridge Bells - When the scarf broker enters play. - Bridge bells clatter above the stalls, and every head turns just late enough to miss the broker's first glance.
